zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV於1150年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，他的父親Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier21歲，母親Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne16歲。他於1171年5月23日與Ida d'Avesnes在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯勒-孔特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1192年在約旦享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV于1150年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，他的父亲Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier21岁，母亲Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne16岁。他于1171年5月23日与Ida d'Avesnes在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯勒-孔特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1192年在约旦享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV was born in 1150, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, was 21 and his mother, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, was 16. He married Ida d'Avesnes on 23 May 1171, in Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1192, in Jordan, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV est né en 1150, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Ida d'Avesnes le 23 mai 1171, à Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1192, à Jordanie, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV 1150 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier 21 und seine Mutter Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne 16. Er hat am 23. Mai 1171 in Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Ida d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1192 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Jordanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV è nato il nel 1150 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Ida d'Avesnes il 23 maggio 1171, nel Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1192, nel Giordania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Saint-Omer IVが1150年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllierは21歳，母Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenneは16歳であった。1171年5月23日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスエイベスネス-レ-コムトでIda d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1192年にヨルダンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV(이)가 1150년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1171년 5월 23일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 에베스네스-레-코트에서 Ida d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1192년 요르단에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV nasceu em 1150, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida d'Avesnes em 23 de maio de 1171, em Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1192, em Jordânia, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV родился в 1150 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida d'Avesnes 23 мая 1171 г. в местности авеснес-ле-комт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1192 г. в местности Иордания в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.from 1171 to 1191: mai le 1171 e o'o I le 1191

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV nació en 1150, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Ida d'Avesnes el 23 de mayo de 1171, en Avesnes-le-Comte, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1192, en Jordania, a la edad de 42 años.
